name: nonempty_has_positive_len
reason: tests the reverse direction — a positive count should force nonzero len; if the biconditional is wrong this could fail

name: empty_multiset_len_zero
reason: empty multiset should have length zero — tests basic consistency of Multiset axioms

name: singleton_len_one
reason: inserting one element into empty should give len 1 — if len axioms are inconsistent this could produce a different value

name: choose_returns_contained_element
reason: choose on nonempty multiset should return an element with positive count — tests that choose's axiomatization is consistent with len

name: add_then_remove_preserves_len
reason: insert then remove of same element should preserve length — tests consistency between insert/remove/len axioms
